info.title: Steam Achievement Tracker API
info.description: API for syncing and reading Steam achievement intelligence data

personaName.description: Current Steam persona name, when visible.

profileUrl.description: Steam community profile URL, when available.

visibilityState.description: Steam visibility state returned by the Steam Web API.

isPrivate.description: Whether the profile is private or unavailable for sync.

lastSyncedAt.description: Last time this profile was synced from Steam.

personaName.description: Current Steam persona name, when visible.

visibilityState.description: Steam visibility state returned by the Steam Web API.

isPrivate.description: Whether the profile is private or unavailable for sync.

lastSyncedAt.description: Last time this profile was synced from Steam.

averageCompletionPercentage.description: Average completion percentage across profile games.

summary.example: A clean route for completing every achievement.

unlockState.description: unknown means achievement metadata exists but player unlock state has not been synced or is unavailable.

appIds.description: Optional Steam app IDs for achievements sync. Omit to sync achievements for all stored profile games.

syncRunId.description: PostgreSQL sync_runs ID used for polling status.

jobId.description: BullMQ job ID for operational debugging.

errorMessage.example: STEAM_API_KEY is not configured in backend runtime environment.

slug.description: Lowercase public profile slug. Use null to clear the slug.
